title: Heartsmod
description: make a hearts mod that gives you extra 3 extra lives that can only reduced after being killed by another player
body: Introducing HeartsMod, a Forge mod that gives players an extra layer of excitement in PvP gameplay! With this mod, each player starts with three additional lives, but there’s a twist: these lives can only be removed if you’re killed by another player. This makes every encounter more strategic and intense. Built for Forge, HeartsMod is perfect for those looking to spice up their multiplayer experience. I also create custom mods for Forge and Fabric, so if you have a unique idea, I can bring it to life for your favorite Minecraft version!
